_comment: To add a new tip: append a new object to items. Use a unique id (tip-016, tip-017...). category is 'new' | 'tip' | 'app' | 'fixed'. body should be 2-3 sentences max. link is one of the keys in WHATS_NEW_ROUTES inside dashboard.js (currently: customer-summary, engagement-summary, employee-summary, team-skills, team, leave, certificates, knowledge-base, my-sessions, approvals, log-session) — leave null to render no link button. Push the file to deploy; existing users see new items in their next shuffle (the JS detects items added since the last shuffle and reshuffles). Tips older than 3-4 months that were category 'new' should be edited down to 'tip' so the badge accurately reflects 'recently shipped'. v121 NEW FIELD: 'version' (e.g. 'v121') opts an item into the update-pill 'what's new' modal — items WITHOUT this field stay dashboard-tips-only. Every ship from v121 onward should append a versioned entry summarising what changed.

items.title: Customer Summary report
items.body: Reports → Customer Summary aggregates hours per customer across all session types, including engagement-less Customer Testing sessions that don't show up in Engagement Summary.

items.title: Gulfit Relevant skills classification
items.body: Team Skills page has a Gulfit Relevant toggle on each product line. Managers can flag core offerings; filter chips at top split the matrix into Gulfit / General / All.

items.title: Tech Review activity
items.body: When logging a Pre-Sales-Task session, Activity Type now includes Tech Review — for time spent reviewing someone else's proposal, distinct from drafting one.

items.title: Team Portfolio editable
items.body: Managers can hover a member's name on the Team Portfolio page and click the pencil icon to edit it inline. Same for phone numbers — or '+ Add phone' if it's blank.

items.title: Install as a phone app
items.body: Add NetSec Portal to your phone home screen for one-tap access. iPhone: Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen. Android: Chrome → three-dot menu → Install App.

items.title: Export reports to CSV
items.body: Engagement Summary, Customer Summary and Employee Summary all have an Export CSV button at the top right. The export reflects whatever filters and sorts are applied.

items.title: Filter reports by year
items.body: Every report has a year dropdown at the top. Pick a year to focus the totals; pick All Years to roll everything up.

items.title: Sort any report column
items.body: Customer Summary supports click-to-sort on every column. Click a header to toggle; the arrow indicator shows current sort direction.

items.title: Snooze dashboard alerts
items.body: If 'Needs Your Attention' shows something you can't act on right now, click the bell-off icon to hide that alert for 7 days. It reappears automatically if the underlying issue still holds.

items.title: Request comp off
items.body: Earned overtime credits? Go to Leave → Log → Request Comp Off to submit a request to your manager. Half-day and full-day supported.

items.title: Track certifications
items.body: Upload PDFs of your certs to the Certificates page. Expiry dates within 30 days surface on the manager dashboard automatically.

items.title: Submit knowledge base articles
items.body: Share what you've learned. Knowledge Base accepts free-text articles plus optional reference URLs (SharePoint links, vendor docs, etc.).

items.title: Cancel future leave
items.body: Plans changed? You can cancel an approved leave that hasn't started yet. Mid-leave cancellation counts past days; future days are dropped from your used total.

items.title: Know who to ask
items.body: Team Skills matrix shows everyone's proficiency on each product line — beginner / intermediate / expert / under training. Useful when you hit a wall on a vendor you've never touched.

items.title: Search past sessions
items.body: My Sessions has filter chips and a member filter at the top. Combine type + customer + engagement + dates to surface specific sessions fast.

items.title: POC-specific activity types
items.body: When logging a POC session, Activity Type now offers POC-specific options: PoC Documentation, Initial Discussion, Design Discussion, PoC Branch Migration, Troubleshooting/Monitoring, and PoC Report.

items.title: Employee Summary now counts all logged hours
items.body: Employee Summary was dropping the logger's credit on sessions where their own name wasn't in team_members. Totals now agree with the Activity Matrix (logger plus team members).

items.title: On-demand PoC flag
items.body: POCs can be marked as on-demand requests via a dedicated checkbox in the tracker edit form. Flagged POCs show a purple 'On Demand' badge in the tracker list, cards, and detail view.

items.title: See what's new before updating
items.body: Clicking the Update pill now opens a popup listing what changed since your last version. Review the changes, then click 'Update now' — or 'Later' to keep working and update when ready.

items.title: Troubleshooting on Internal sessions
items.body: Internal session Activity Type now includes 'Troubleshooting' alongside Testing for customers, Lab setup, and Others. Use it for time spent diagnosing internal lab or environment issues.

items.title: Nine bug fixes from a full-app audit
items.body: Engagement Summary now credits the logger on every session (same fix Employee Summary got in v119). Milestones can be marked Completed (the Closed option never worked). Certificates expiring within 30 days now match the dashboard alert window. Inventory model filter includes all 5 supported models. Leave edit modal stores lowercase type and supports needs_review/cancelled status. Leave Approvals filter includes those states too. Plus two XSS-safe escapes on user-typed names.

items.title: Accessibility pass — keyboard and screen reader support
items.body: Sidebar items, skill-matrix cells, and inline edit pencils are now keyboard-reachable with visible focus rings. Modals trap focus, support Escape to close, and announce themselves as dialogs to screen readers. Bell, hamburger, and account menu now announce their open/closed state. Icon-only buttons (Approve/Reject, Edit/Delete OT) have proper labels. Pending-approval task badge contrast bumped and a clock icon added so color-blind users can distinguish it from Ongoing.

items.title: Mobile and tablet polish — 7 layout fixes
items.body: Notifications dropdown anchors to both gutters on phones (no more clipping off-screen). Modal action bars sit side-by-side in a clean sticky bar instead of vertical stack. AMC list now swaps between table and cards when you rotate the device, matching PS Deals. Skill matrix accordion now kicks in on tablets up to 900px (was 720) so the 9-column matrix doesn't overflow. Task approve-remark input hides on phones (still available in the Approvals card view). Manager dashboard's 5th stat tile spans full width on tablets instead of dangling. Task Completions sub-tab now matches Leave/OT sub-tabs with a 'Pending Approval (N)' heading.

items.title: Consistency polish — exports, filters, and editing
items.body: Engagement Summary and Employee Summary now have Export CSV like Customer Summary. Edit Session uses the same Team Members checkbox UI as Log Session (no more free-text typos). Knowledge Base gets a Clear filters button matching Inventory / AMC / PS Deals. OT Sessions filter bar shows a 'Period:' note when a date filter is active. AMC and PS Deals action columns now say 'Actions'. Certificates 'Other' chip renamed to 'General' to match Team Skills. Plus dead duplicate CSS removed and the legacy backup banner cleared out.

items.title: UX polish — 10 small improvements
items.body: Tasks sidebar badge now counts only items awaiting your approval, not every open task. Dashboard 'Needs Your Attention' See-all toggles back to Show less so you can collapse it. Edit Engagement modal shows Last Updated so you don't lose audit context while editing. Changing an engagement type clears the stale phase value (POC and Project use different phase lists). Notifications get a Mark all read link and read items dim out. Recurring task tabs show the Start/ETA/End dates underneath the period pill (were hidden entirely). AMC list shows 'N days' remaining on active contracts so renewals are visible at a glance. KB excerpts cut at word boundaries instead of mid-word. OT Policy 'Eve' band text now matches the actual rule. Legacy approved-leave records are now read-only (the banner said edits don't count — now the buttons match).

items.title: New 'Other' engagement type
items.body: Add Engagement now offers '📋 Other' as a 6th type alongside Project / POC / AMC / Support / Pre-Sales-Task. Use it for engagements that don't fit the standard categories. Sessions logged under an Other engagement count toward all the usual reports (Engagement Summary, Customer Summary, Employee Summary, Activity Matrix) — it's a real first-class type, not a hack. Phase dropdown defaults to the project waterfall; Activity Type defaults to the standard delivery list.

items.title: Internal cleanup — orphan backup code removed
items.body: Removed 99 lines of unused backup code (checkBackupReminder / dismissBackup / downloadBackup) that lingered after the v126 legacy banner deletion. No user-visible change — the active backup path through Admin Tools → Full Backup is untouched.

items.title: Login + small polish — 6 fixes
items.body: Login error messages no longer disappear after 5 seconds (slow readers were losing them); they clear on next submit instead. Bad-password errors now say 'Wrong email or password — try again, or use Forgot password' instead of the raw Supabase code. Screen readers announce login errors and successes. Knowledge Base article body scrolls as one surface with the modal (no more nested scroll on mobile). Notifications bell hides on phones under 380px so the user-chip name doesn't clip. Team Skills 'G' column header shows the green dot emoji that matches the chip row. Logout spinner now appears on the user-menu Logout button (was targeting the old sidebar entry).

items.title: PS Deals status filter + certificate upload size indicator
items.body: Pre-Sales Deals list gets a status chip-row above the table matching the AMC contracts layout — click All / Quoted / Won / In Progress / Completed / Lost / Cancelled to filter. Certificate upload button now shows the file size while uploading (e.g. 'Uploading 4.2 MB…') so you can see something is happening on slow connections.

items.title: Copy serial numbers in Inventory
items.body: Each device row in Inventory now has a small copy button next to its serial number. Click it to copy the serial to your clipboard — handy for pasting into emails, tickets, or vendor portals without retyping. A green checkmark confirms the copy.
